series_metadata.series_title: Property and Casualty Underwriting and Claim Files
series_metadata.series_description: Series contains correspondence, policies, schedules, collections, assets, reports, contacts, billing, and other underwriting documentation contained within the Origami Risk system. Series contains police reports; estimates; medical documentation; payment requests, case pleadings, and other miscellaneous correspondence and documents sent electronically and saved in the Origami Risk system as necessary to manage claims.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Electronic: Erase
